title: Magic Addition with Carry Over
learningGoal: Learn how to add 2-digit numbers using carry over.

nodes.text: Spark Panda wants to buy 25 apples and 18 bananas. How many fruits does he have in total?

nodes.title: Let's group the Ones!
nodes.text: First, we add the ones: 5 + 8 = 13. We can't keep 13 in the Ones room! We keep the 3, and carry the 1 Ten to the Tens room.

nodes.question: What is 25 + 18?

commonMistakes.0: Did you forget to add the 1 we carried over?
commonMistakes.3: We can't write 13 in the Ones column. We must carry the 1!

nodes.hint: Add 5 + 8 first. It's 13. Write 3 and carry 1. Then add 2 + 1 + 1.

nodes.text: Great job! You helped Spark Panda count all 43 fruits!
nodes.funFact: Did you know Pandas eat bamboo for 12 hours every day? 🎋
